name: Poloniex Cryptocurrency Exchange API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency exchange REST and WebSocket API — enabling traders to access spot trading across 100+ pairs, manage orders, stream real-time market data, and handle account operations, now operated by Polo Digital Assets under Justin Sun (TRON founder) ownership after acquisition from Circle, with HMAC-SHA256 authentication for private endpoints.
use_cases: Executing spot trades via Poloniex REST API for algorithmic trading strategies
Streaming real-time order book data via Poloniex WebSocket for market monitoring
Managing trading portfolio via Poloniex API for automated portfolio rebalancing
Accessing historical OHLCV data via Poloniex API for backtesting trading strategies
Participating in staking and lending via Poloniex API for yield generation
not_for: US users (Poloniex blocked US users in 2019 — use Coinbase or Kraken)
Wide altcoin selection comparable to Binance or Gate.io (reduced to ~100 pairs)
best_when: A non-US trader needs a legacy exchange with established API for spot trading, particularly for TRON ecosystem tokens or TRX-related trading pairs.
avoid_when: You're in the US (blocked), need regulatory compliance, wide altcoin selection, or institutional-grade services.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA256 signing. signatureMethod: HmacSHA256. signature: HMAC-SHA256 of request body JSON. key header and sign header. timestamp parameter. API key permissions: View, Exchange, Lending, Withdrawals. No OAuth2. WebSocket: separate authentication channel message for private data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access free; maker 0% / taker 0.155% (volume tiers available)
pricing.notes: Founded 2014 (Tristan D'Agosta). Originally US-based. Acquired by Circle (USDC) in 2018. Sold to Polo Digital Assets (linked to Justin Sun, TRON founder) in 2019. Blocked US users after sale. Seychelles incorporated. Controversial ownership: Justin Sun has faced regulatory scrutiny from SEC (fraud allegations 2023). Exchange was historically important for altcoin trading (Ethereum, XRP when few exchanges listed them). Dramatically reduced pair count post-acquisition. 2021 hack: $126M lost. TRON (TRX) native integration. REST API v2 — documentation quality has declined post-acquisition. Community concern about exchange reliability.

performance.rate_limits: 300 requests/second for public; 50/second for private endpoints

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA256. US blocked. Justin Sun/TRON ownership controversy. 2021 $126M hack. Seychelles. Reduced pair count. Documentation quality declined post-acquisition. Not recommended for new integrations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Order creation not idempotent. No client order ID support documented. Cancel idempotent by order ID.
known_agent_gotchas: US users blocked since 2019 — verify user jurisdiction before building Poloniex integrations
Justin Sun / TRON ownership: SEC fraud allegations 2023 — vendor risk assessment required
2021 $126M hack — security history raises concerns for custody of funds
Documentation quality has declined significantly post-2019 acquisition
Pair count dramatically reduced from ~500 to ~100 — check available pairs before assuming coverage
Not recommended for new integrations given ownership controversy and reliability history

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 signing. API key permission scopes. Seychelles jurisdiction (minimal regulation). US blocked. Justin Sun ownership (SEC fraud allegations). 2021 $126M hack. Controversial ownership raises governance risk. Not recommended for significant fund custody. Regulatory status unclear under current ownership.
